name: deeploy

metadata.name: deeploy
classifiers: License :: OSI Approved :: Apache Software License
metadata.summary: The official Deeploy client for Python

documentation:
## Deeploy Python Client API Reference

Python client for interacting with Deeploy: Deploying ML with confidence.

Read the [documentation](https://docs.deeploy.ml) or visit the [Deeploy website](https://deeploy.ml) to learn more about Deeploy.

classes.name: deeploy.models.client_options.ClientConfig
documentation:
Class containing the Deeploy client options

Attributes:
  host: string representing the domain on which Deeploy is hosted
  workspace_id: string representing the workspace id in which to create
    deployments
  access_key: string representing the personal access key
  secret_key: string representing the personal secret key
  token: string representing the Deployment token

classes.name: deeploy.models.get_prediction_logs_options.GetPredictionLogsOptions

class_variables.name: deeploy.models.get_prediction_logs_options.GetPredictionLogsOptions.start
documentation: int, optional: the start timestamp of the creation of the prediction log, presented as a unix timestamp in milliseconds

class_variables.name: deeploy.models.get_prediction_logs_options.GetPredictionLogsOptions.end
documentation: int, optional: the end timestamp of the creation of the prediction log, presented as a unix timestamp in milliseconds

class_variables.name: deeploy.models.get_prediction_logs_options.GetPredictionLogsOptions.offset
documentation: int, optional: the offset skips the first prediction logs for the given offset times the limit

class_variables.name: deeploy.models.get_prediction_logs_options.GetPredictionLogsOptions.limit
documentation: int, optional: the maximum number of prediction logs to retrieve in one call

class_variables.name: deeploy.models.get_prediction_logs_options.GetPredictionLogsOptions.sort
documentation: str, optional: the sorting applied to the retrieved prediction logs

class_variables.name: deeploy.models.get_prediction_logs_options.GetPredictionLogsOptions.custom_id
documentation: str, optional: the custom ID associated to the prediction logs

class_variables.name: deeploy.models.get_prediction_logs_options.GetPredictionLogsOptions.request_log_id
documentation: str, optional: the uuid of the request log

class_variables.name: deeploy.models.get_prediction_logs_options.GetPredictionLogsOptions.id
documentation: str, optional: the uuid of the prediction log

class_variables.name: deeploy.models.get_prediction_logs_options.GetPredictionLogsOptions.prediction_class
documentation: str, optional: the prediction class from your metadata.json used to filter the prediction logs based on the value of their response body

class_variables.name: deeploy.models.get_prediction_logs_options.GetPredictionLogsOptions.actual
documentation: str, optional: whether the actual is available on the prediction log

class_variables.name: deeploy.models.get_prediction_logs_options.GetPredictionLogsOptions.evaluation
documentation: str, optional: the evaluation status of the prediction log

class_variables.name: deeploy.models.get_prediction_logs_options.GetPredictionLogsOptions.status
documentation: str, optional: the status of the request log of the prediction log
Class that contains the options for retrieving prediction logs from a Deployment

classes.name: deeploy.models.update_external_deployment.UpdateExternalDeployment

class_variables.name: deeploy.models.update_external_deployment.UpdateExternalDeployment.url
documentation: str, optional: url endpoint of external deployment

class_variables.name: deeploy.models.update_external_deployment.UpdateExternalDeployment.authentication
documentation: str, optional: enum value from ExternalUrlAuthenticationMethod class.

class_variables.name: deeploy.models.update_external_deployment.UpdateExternalDeployment.username
documentation: str, optional: username for basic authentication

class_variables.name: deeploy.models.update_external_deployment.UpdateExternalDeployment.custom_header
documentation: str, optional: custom header for custom authentication

class_variables.name: deeploy.models.update_external_deployment.UpdateExternalDeployment.password
documentation: str, optional: password/bearer token/key for basic/bearer/custom authentication
Class that contains the options for updating a External Deployment

classes.name: deeploy.models.create_metadata.CreateMetadata

class_variables.name: deeploy.models.create_metadata.CreateMetadata.features
documentation: List, optional: list of features

class_variables.name: deeploy.models.create_metadata.CreateMetadata.prediction_classes
documentation:
dict, optional: dict to map class labels to values,
class label : value as deployment metadata

class_variables.name: deeploy.models.create_metadata.CreateMetadata.problem_type
documentation: str, optional: model problem type classification or regression

class_variables.name: deeploy.models.create_metadata.CreateMetadata.example_input
documentation: dict, optional: example of a json input that can be consumed by the model

class_variables.name: deeploy.models.create_metadata.CreateMetadata.example_output
documentation: dict, optional: example of a json output that can be given back by the model

class_variables.name: deeploy.models.create_metadata.CreateMetadata.input_tensor_shape
documentation: str, optional: the tensor dimensions of the json input that can be consumed by the model

class_variables.name: deeploy.models.create_metadata.CreateMetadata.output_tensor_shape
documentation: str, optional: the tensor dimensions of the json output that can be given back by the model

class_variables.name: deeploy.models.create_metadata.CreateMetadata.custom_id
documentation: str: name of the custom id
Class that contains the options for creating a metadata.json

documentation:
list: a list of actuals conform the [data plane v1 format](https://kserve.github.io/website/master/modelserving/data_plane/v1_protocol)
where the index of the actual value corresponds with the index of the provided prediction log id
Class that contains the options for creating actuals

documentation: bool, optional: whether to deploy the model in a serverless fashion. Defaults to False

documentation: str, optional: uuid of credentials generated in Deeploy to access private Blob storage

documentation: int, optional: RAM limit of model pod, in Megabytes.

class_variables.name: deeploy.models.create_deployment.CreateDeployment.model_cpu_request
documentation: float, optional: CPU request of model pod, in number of cores.

documentation: list, optional: environment variable IDs of which the key and value will be passed to the model container as environment variables

class_variables.name: deeploy.models.create_deployment.CreateDeployment.model_args
documentation: dict, optional: arguments to pass to model container key is argument name, value is argument value

class_variables.name: deeploy.models.create_deployment.CreateDeployment.explainer_serverless
documentation: bool, optional: whether to deploy the explainer in a serverless fashion. Defaults to False

documentation: dict, optional: arguments to pass to explainer container key is argument name, value is argument value

methods.name: deeploy.client.Client.__init__
documentation:
Initialise the Deeploy client
Parameters:
    host (str): The host at which Deeploy is located, i.e. deeploy.example.com

        is located
    access_key (str, optional): Personal Access Key generated from the Deeploy UI
    secret_key (str, optional): Secret Access Key generated from the Deeploy UI
    deployment_token (str, optional): Deployment token generated from the Deeploy UI

Get the current environment variable IDs for an artifact of your Deployment
This method can be used to help update your Deployment
Parameters:

    artifact (str): The artifact of which to retrieve the environment variable IDs from

methods.name: deeploy.deepfair.fair.DeeployFairLab.__init__
documentation:
X : pandas dataframe or numpy array
y_true : numpy array, pandas dataframe, or pandas Series
    represent the ground truth
y_pred : numpy array, pandas dataframe, or pandas Series
    contain the predicted values
feature_names : list of string
    this parameter is necessary if the user supply X in a numpy array
sensitive_features: list of string
    this list contains the names of the sensitive features
nominal_features : optional, list of strings
    list of nominal features
numeric_features : optional, list of strings
    list of numeric features

methods.name: deeploy.deepfair.fair.DeeployFairLab.find_sub_groups
documentation:
---
param a (float): the alpha parameter. the higher the alpha, the less the subgroups
  redundancy is taken into account.
param algorithm (SearchAlgorithm): the choice of search algorithm to utilize to obtain
  sub groups
param beam_width (int): the beam width parameter. the higher the beam width, the more
  subgroups are considered.
param quality_factor: name of the quality factor to use for subgroup discovery or
  custom Fairlearn metric function
---

kwargs: keyword arguments to be passed to the search algorithm

methods.name: deeploy.deepfair.fair.DeeployFairLab.get_subgroup_mask
documentation:
This method generate and return the feature of the subgroup with index = sg_index in the current object.

: The result is indeed a boolean array of the same length of the dataset X.
  Each i-th element of this array is true iff the i-th tuple of X belong to the subgroup with index sg_index.

```
param index

int subgroup_index

return boolean

mapping for subgroup wrt to original dataset
```

methods.name: deeploy.deepfair.fair.DeeployFairLab.get_subgroup_description
documentation:
This method returns description of subgroup at provided index from resultset
\:param index: int subgroup_index

methods.name: deeploy.deepfair.fair.DeeployFairLab.get_fairness_metrics_for_user_defined_subgroup
documentation:
multi_condition_func: lambda function condition on row for defining subgroup.
    eg. lambda row: ((row['age'] > 35) & (row['sex'] in ['Male', 'Nonbinary']) )

modules.name: deeploy.deepfair.metrics
documentation: Source: https://github.com/adubowski/subgroup-harm-assessor/blob/main/metrics.py

functions.name: deeploy.deepfair.metrics.average_log_loss_score
documentation: Average log loss function.

functions.name: deeploy.deepfair.metrics.miscalibration_score
documentation: Miscalibration score. Calibration is the difference between the predicted and the true probability of the positive class.

functions.name: deeploy.deepfair.metrics.get_qf_from_str
documentation:
Get the quality function from a string.

Args:
    metric (str): Name of the metric. If None, the default metric is used.
    transform (str): Type of the metric. Can be "difference", "ratio" or other fairlearn supported transforms

Returns: the quality function according to the selected metric - a defined function
or a string (in case of equalized odds difference as it's already defined in fairsd)

functions.name: deeploy.deepfair.metrics.get_name_from_metric_str
documentation: Get the name of the metric from a string nicely formatted.

functions.name: deeploy.deepfair.metrics.trim_transform_from_str
documentation: Trim the transform from a string.

functions.name: deeploy.deepfair.metrics.get_quality_function_from_str
documentation: Get the quality metric from a string.

functions.name: deeploy.deepfair.metrics.sort_quality_metrics_df
documentation: Sort the result set dataframe by the quality metric.
